{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = The Immolator
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Immolator]] is an orange flame [[Remnant]] that crackles with strange lightning and juggles fireballs.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
